message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Clarify and define the requirements for custom programming to avoid ambiguity.",
      "leverage": "Clear requirements can lead to more accurate estimates and reduce the risk of project delays.",
      "proposed_language": "The requirements for the custom programming shall be clearly defined and documented in a Requirements Specification document prior to the commencement of any Phase.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that both parties have a mutual understanding of the expectations, which can minimize disputes and enhance project efficiency.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish a more favorable payment structure linked to performance milestones.",
      "leverage": "Linking payments to specific milestones can incentivize timely delivery and quality work.",
      "proposed_language": "Payments shall be made upon the successful completion of each Phase, with a percentage of the total cost withheld until the final acceptance test is passed.",
      "rationale": "This structure aligns the developer's incentives with the company's needs, ensuring that payments are made for satisfactory performance.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Introduce penalties for late delivery to ensure accountability.",
      "leverage": "Penalties can motivate the developer to adhere to timelines and improve project management.",
      "proposed_language": "For each day that delivery is late beyond the grace period, a penalty of [insert percentage]% of the total Phase cost shall be applied.",
      "rationale": "This creates a financial incentive for the developer to meet deadlines, reducing the risk of project overruns.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "objective": "Ensure comprehensive acceptance testing procedures are in place.",
      "leverage": "Well-defined acceptance testing can help identify issues early and ensure the software meets the company's needs.",
      "proposed_language": "The Acceptance Test shall include detailed criteria and a timeline for completion, with provisions for retesting if initial tests fail.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that the software delivered meets the agreed-upon specifications and reduces the likelihood of costly revisions after delivery.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "objective": "Define a clear process for handling project changes or scope adjustments.",
      "leverage": "A structured change management process can help manage expectations and prevent scope creep.",
      "proposed_language": "Any changes to the project scope must be documented in a Change Order, which shall be signed by both parties before implementation.",
      "rationale": "This formalizes the process for changes, ensuring that both parties agree on any adjustments to the project scope and associated costs.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.65
    }
  ]
}
